creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Would you take this Amazing Day Trip from NYC!?

How to get there: Take the Poughkeepsie Line🚞 from Grand Central to Croton-Harmon(50 minutes, $11 ticket), an 8 minute Uber to 📍Croton Gorge Park(around $10), Follow the guided trail upon arrival and you’ll end up on top of the gorge

#nyc #NewYork #daytrip #travel #nybucketlist

geo_locations: Croton Gorge Park(around $10), Follow the guided trail upon arrival and you’ll end up on top of the gorge
pinned_places: Croton Gorge Park(around $10), Follow the guided trail upon arrival and you’ll end up on top of the gorge

transcription.text: Did you know that if you take this 50-minute train ride from Grand Central and get out at Croton Harmon, then take an 8-minute Uber ride, hike this trail for about 10 minutes, you'll end up on top of this giant gorge with rushing water, stunning mountain views, a beautiful lake, and this gorgeous park perfect for a picnic under a 300-foot-tall dam. This is known as Croton Gorge Park.
